title: Gilded Armor
description: Gilded armor can be used to make piglins peaceful while using other armor.
body:
<center>

![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/xlmQMXn.png)

[![Discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Hyperbole-Devs/vectors/refs/heads/neoforge_badges/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](https://discord.gg/8tysExaryg)
[![Available for Fabric](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/supported/fabric_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gildedarmor/versions?l=fabric)
[![Available for Forge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy-minimal/supported/forge_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gildedarmor/versions?l=forge)
[![Available for NeoForge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MaroonShaded/maroonshaded.github.io/refs/heads/main/badges/cozy-minimal/supported/neoforge_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/gildedarmor/versions?l=neoforge)

![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/24oOTbP.png)

## Gilded Armor

</center>

This mod adds an armor set with the same properties as netherite that doesn't aggravate piglins.

![Image](https://i.imgur.com/dfW6bdg.png)

To craft it, just combine the piece of netherite armor you want with a gold ingot on a smithing table. Don't worry about your enchantments: they are retained as well as durability.

![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/AfXIQ7o.png)

![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/24oOTbP.png)
